name: Steve Kuhn
abstract: Steve Kuhn (born March 24, 1938) is an American jazz pianist, composer, arranger, bandleader, and educator. He is the composer of the jazz standard "The Saga of Harrison Crabfeathers".

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Steve Kuhn Quartet / Zane Massey Sextet

works.t: Let's Face the Music and Dance
Sophisticated Ladies: It Don't Mean a Thing
I Get Along Without You Very Well

about_quotes.speaker: Sheila Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: I was with Steve Kuhn’s group. I recorded several things on ECM with Steve Kuhn... We were friends but I don‟t, you know, obviously he thought I could add something to it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sheila Jordan — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ken Peplowski
about_quotes.evidence: I remember playing a wedding pretty soon after I moved to New York with Buddy Tate on saxophone, Mel Lewis on drums and Steve Kuhn on piano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ken Peplowski interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Ken Peplowski
about_quotes.evidence: the first one that I ever did the band was Mel Lewis, Milt Hinton, Bucky Pizzarelli, Steve Kuhn, and Buddy Tate
about_quotes.doc_title: Ken Peplowski interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 9, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Art Farmer
about_quotes.evidence: After Jim left the group, we got a pianist by the name of Steve Kuhn... We worked together for about a year.
about_quotes.doc_title: Art Farmer — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bley Carla
about_quotes.evidence: certain musicians, the people that played my music and asked me for tunes were ... Steve Kuhn, who had just come to town, and he’s still playing some of my tunes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bley Carla — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Steve Kuhn, Swallow, and Moses. [INTERVIEWEE] Is Hino on that? ... [INTERVIEWER] Mike used to play with Steve Kuhn ... [INTERVIEWEE] Mike Smith?
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
